description: Regulatory requirements mapped to observable fact types for compliance gap detection.

regulations.name: Factories Act 1948 — Section 41B (Hazardous Process)
regulations.requirement: Install and maintain automatic temperature monitoring with audible alarms on hazardous chemical storage tanks.

regulations.name: OISD-118 — Styrene Storage (Temperature Control)
regulations.requirement: Maintain styrene tank temperature below 20°C with continuous chilled brine circulation during shutdown.

regulations.name: PESO — Pressure Vessel Inspection (Ladle/Refractory)
regulations.requirement: Ladle refractory lining must be inspected per schedule; argon purging mandatory before each heat.

regulations.name: Environmental Clearance — Valid Permit Required
regulations.requirement: Operations must hold valid environmental clearance; expired permits require immediate cessation or renewal.

regulations.name: ISO 45001 — Hierarchy of Controls (Near-Miss Escalation)
regulations.requirement: Near-miss observations and alarm responses must be escalated and tracked to closure within 48 hours.

regulations.name: BIS Quality Standards — Raw Material Traceability
regulations.requirement: Coke and hot-metal quality deviations must trigger upstream investigation within 24 hours.
